feature_tested: LUCCCA Dashboard simulation data, Weekly P&L digest, Access request admin panel, EchoAi³ role-filtered responses, Sidebar z-index fix
summary: All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Dashboard loads with accurate simulation data (Revenue $279K, Labor $232K/83.5%), sidebar z-index fix working correctly (sidebar visible above panels at z-index 99901).

endpoints: GET /api/enterprise/command-center - Returns revenue $279,009.47 from 2713 POS transactions
GET /api/enterprise/command-center - Returns labor cost $232,890 from GL entries
GET /api/enterprise/command-center - Returns labor % 83.5% (GL labor / POS revenue)
GET /api/enterprise/command-center - Returns events data (10 events, pipeline active)
POST /api/admin-ops/weekly-digest - Returns AI narrative (Emergent LLM Key)
GET /api/admin-ops/access-requests - Lists pending requests (2 from usr-mgr-001)
POST /api/admin-ops/access-requests/decide - Approves/denies requests and updates user access
POST /api/echoai3/think (usr-mgr-001) - Manager gets food cost data with role-appropriate response
POST /api/echoai3/think (usr-chef-001) - Exec chef gets waste_tracking and labor_schedules data
GET /api/echoai3/health - Returns operational status with 9 domains

verified_elements: Sidebar visible on left side with z-index 99901
Top-selling items list visible (Filet Mignon 8oz, Lobster Roll, etc.)
Labor breakdown by department visible (FOH Servers 32%, BOH Cooks 25%)
Sidebar remains visible when dashboard panel is open (z-index fix working)

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard labor_pct correctly shows 83.5% which is GL total labor ($232K) / total POS revenue ($279K)
Sidebar z-index changed from 9901 to 99901 to stay above panels (which start at z-index 20010)
Weekly digest AI narrative generated via Emergent LLM Key (gpt-4.1-mini)
EchoAi³ orchestrator correctly injects waste_tracking and labor_schedules into financial context for exec_chef role
Access request approval updates user's RBAC extra_access and creates notification
test_credentials: No auth required. Test users: usr-mgr-001 (manager), usr-chef-001 (exec_chef), usr-gm-001 (GM)
seed_data_creation: 2713 POS transactions, GL entries with labor codes 6000/6010/6020/6050, 2 pending access requests from usr-mgr-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Dashboard shows accurate simulation data from 2713 POS transactions. Labor cost from GL entries ($232K) divided by POS revenue ($279K) = 83.5%. Sidebar z-index fix (99901) keeps sidebar visible above panels. Weekly digest compares last 7 days vs previous 7 days with AI narrative. Access requests can be approved/denied with RBAC updates. EchoAi³ returns role-filtered responses with waste_tracking and labor_schedules for exec_chef.
